# Ambika Infotech — Full Content

> Boutique software studio in Ahmedabad, India, specialising in Angular web development and cross-platform native mobile apps using Capacitor. Founded October 2025.

---

## About

Ambika Infotech is a boutique software development studio founded in October 2025 and headquartered in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. We are a small, senior team of developers and designers who build high-quality Angular web applications and cross-platform native mobile apps using Capacitor.

We work with startups, SMEs, and enterprises across India and globally, helping them design, build, and ship digital products that are fast, accessible, and maintainable.

**Key facts:**
- Founded: October 2025
- Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- Team languages: English, Hindi, Gujarati
- Projects delivered: 50+
- Happy clients: 30+
- Years of experience: 7+

---

## Services

### Angular Web Development
We build custom, production-grade Angular applications. Our work uses the latest Angular features: standalone components, signals for reactive state management, lazy-loaded routes, Server-Side Rendering (SSR) where needed, and strict TypeScript throughout. Every application we deliver is performant, accessible (WCAG AA), and built for long-term maintainability.

### Capacitor Mobile App Development
We build cross-platform iOS and Android applications using Capacitor on top of Angular. This means a single TypeScript/Angular codebase compiles into native apps distributed on both the Apple App Store and Google Play — while retaining full access to native device APIs (camera, GPS, push notifications, biometrics, etc.). No compromise on native feel.

### Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
We develop Progressive Web Apps that can be installed on any device, work fully offline via service workers, and deliver app-like experiences from a web URL. PWAs remove the friction of app store distribution while giving users a fast, reliable, and engaging experience.

### UI/UX Design & Prototyping
We design clean, accessible, and modern user interfaces. Our design process starts with wireframes and interactive prototypes, then moves to component-based implementation using Bootstrap 5 and a custom SCSS design-token system. Colour contrast, keyboard navigation, and ARIA semantics are non-negotiable standards in every project.

---

## Technologies

### Languages & Frameworks
- **Angular** (latest) — primary frontend framework; standalone components, signals, OnPush change detection
- **TypeScript** (strict mode) — all projects use full strict type checking
- **Capacitor** — cross-platform native runtime for Angular-based mobile apps
- **Node.js** — backend services and build tooling
- **RxJS** — reactive programming for asynchronous data streams

### Styling
- **Bootstrap 5** — utility-first CSS framework for responsive layouts
- **SCSS** — custom design-token system with variables and mixins
- **Bootstrap Icons** — icon set used throughout projects

### State & Data
- **Angular Signals** — fine-grained reactivity for component state
- **NgRx** — large-scale application state management when needed
- **Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Storage)** — rapid backend for web and mobile
- **REST APIs & GraphQL** — integration with third-party and custom APIs

### Tooling & Quality
- **Angular CLI** — project scaffolding, builds, and migrations
- **ESLint + Prettier** — code quality and consistent formatting
- **Karma / Jest** — unit testing
- **Playwright / Cypress** — end-to-end testing

---

## Portfolio Highlights

Ambika Infotech has delivered projects across multiple industries including:
- **SaaS dashboards** — data-heavy Angular applications with real-time updates
- **E-commerce frontends** — fast, SEO-friendly storefronts with Angular Universal SSR
- **Healthcare apps** — HIPAA-conscious mobile apps with Capacitor and secure APIs
- **Logistics platforms** — GPS-integrated Capacitor apps with offline-first architecture
- **Corporate websites** — accessible, performance-optimised Angular static sites

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What services does Ambika Infotech offer?**
A: Angular web application development, Capacitor cross-platform mobile app development (iOS & Android), Progressive Web App (PWA) development, and UI/UX design and prototyping.

**Q: What technologies does Ambika Infotech specialise in?**
A: Angular (latest version), TypeScript, Capacitor, Node.js, Bootstrap 5, SCSS, RxJS, NgRx, Firebase, and REST/GraphQL API integration.

**Q: Where is Ambika Infotech located?**
A: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. We work with clients globally and collaborate remotely across time zones.

**Q: How many projects has Ambika Infotech delivered?**
A: Ambika Infotech was founded in October 2025 and has been growing rapidly since launch, delivering quality Angular and Capacitor projects.

**Q: Can Ambika Infotech build mobile apps for both iOS and Android?**
A: Yes. We use Capacitor on top of Angular to produce a single codebase that deploys to both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play) with full native device API access.

**Q: Does Ambika Infotech work with international clients?**
A: Yes. While based in Ahmedabad, India, we work with clients across the globe and are experienced in remote collaboration.

**Q: What is the typical project engagement model?**
A: We offer fixed-scope project delivery, ongoing retainer/maintenance, and team augmentation depending on client needs.

**Q: How can I contact Ambika Infotech?**
A: Email hello@ambikainfotech.online, use the contact form at https://www.3d.ambikainfotech.online/#contact, connect on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/company/ambika-infotech, or find us on GitHub at github.com/ambikainfotech.
